title: [Cobblemon 1.7] Midnight Meet & Glitz Skin Collection
description: Adds simple festive, party skins based on Pokémon GO variants for several Pokemon, perfect for celebration!
body:
# MIDNIGHT MEET & GLITZ — COBBLEMON SKIN COLLECTION

As the final moments of the year gather beneath a velvet sky, midnight arrives fulfilling anticipation. Colorful lights glow softly, laughter rings bright everywhere, and the air is filled with joyous chatter as the end of the year draws near.

Fireworks set the sky ablaze, reflections dancing across twinkling eyes. Pokémon and Trainers step into the night dressed in fun attire, ready to party with the **Midnight Meet & Glitz** skin collection! 

**This collection features simple festive, party skins based on Pokémon GO variants for:**
- Hoothoot line - Golden Top Hat Style
- Slowpoke line - 2026 Glasses Style
- Pikachu line - New Year's Top Hat Style
- Eevee line - New Year's Top Hat Style
- All starters (First stage) - Party Hat Style


![Midnight Meet & Glitz](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/267f5b52280c4d13684a7090a1958d6e4eee70a9.jpeg)




To accessorize your Pokemon, equip a **Firework Rocket** on them and they'll be all set to celebrate the end of the year!

**With hearts full and dreams alight, the celebration begins. Cheers to the memories made and the adventures ahead of us!**


*Acquirement of models within this collection does not grant exclusive rights nor rights to resell in crates or server shops. Shiny textures included. Additional animations not included, only modified base animations from Cobblemon.*

## TUTORIAL FOR NEWBIES!
1. Download the latest version of the addon pack from Modrinth, and you need to EXTRACT the zip. You will get a Resourcepack and a Datapack zip.

2. Go to your server / world files directory and look for the 'resourcepack' folder.  Drop the Resource pack zip there.

3. Then you need to look for your world's save data folder ( its usually named like, "saves" or "world" ) and look for the 'datapack' folder inside. Drop the Datapack zip there

4. If you are experiencing problems, find me in the official Discord server of the Cobblemon mod. I will be happy to assist you.
